query:
INSERT INTO core.blobs (
                id,
                annex_backend,
                content_hash,
                size_bytes,
                checksum_blake3,
                original_filename,
                mime_type,
                metadata
            ) VALUES (
                $1::uuid::ulid,
                $2,
                $3,
                $4,
                $5,
                $6,
                $7,
                $8
            )
